mapper.sql: select template_id, template_name, template_code, is_default, config_json, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from bpm_workbench_template
mapper.select: select t.template_id, t.template_name, t.template_code, t.is_default, t.config_json, t.status from bpm_workbench_template t where t.status = '0' and t.is_default = '1' and ( not exists (select 1 from bpm_workbench_template_scope s where s.template_id = t.template_id) or exists ( select 1 from bpm_workbench_template_scope s where s.template_id = t.template_id and ( (s.scope_type = '1' and s.scope_target_id in (select role_id from sys_user_role where user_id = #{userId})) or (s.scope_type = '2' and s.scope_target_id in ( select dept_id from sys_user where user_id = #{userId} union select d.dept_id from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on find_in_set(d.dept_id, u.dept_id) > 0 where u.user_id = #{userId} )) or (s.scope_type = '3' and s.scope_target_id = #{userId}) ) ) ) order by t.create_time desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into bpm_workbench_template ( template_name, template_code, is_default, config_json, status, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{templateName}, #{templateCode}, #{isDefault}, #{configJson}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from bpm_workbench_template where template_id in
#{templateId}
